name: agent_swarm_manifest
description: Return Agent Swarm's package manifest and detected backend availability.

name: agent_swarm_insights
description: Return lazy aggregate routing insights derived from append-only agent outcome telemetry.

name: agent_swarm_profiles
description: List dedicated agent profiles with role matches, helper agents, automation hooks, and deterministic checks.

name: agent_swarm_automation_hooks
description: List deterministic host-only automation hooks that profiles can request without baking codegen tools into the substrate.

name: agent_swarm_presets
description: List common swarm presets for architecture councils, audits, UI polish, regression hunts, and API docs follow-up.

name: agent_swarm_preset
description: Execute a named common swarm preset by id.

name: agent_swarm_recommend
description: Recommend manager and participant specs for a task using learned telemetry plus safe defaults.

name: agent_swarm_feedback
description: Record explicit user feedback for an agent/role so future routing can learn over time.

agent.description: Agent spec that received feedback, such as gemini or claude:sonnet

role.description: Routing role, such as architecture, hardening, api-docs, or manager

name: agent_swarm_proposals
description: List open learning-layer proposals and agent votes.

name: agent_swarm_proposal_record
description: Record a proposal for future swarm behavior, routing, UI, or architecture changes.

proposed_by.description: Agent, user, or system that proposed the change.

name: agent_swarm_proposal_vote
description: Append an agent or user vote to a proposal. Votes are advisory and visible in insights.

voter.description: Agent spec, role, or user label.

name: agent_swarm_activity_record
description: Append a harness-neutral live activity record so any runtime can appear in the Agent Swarm graph.

agent_type.description: codex, claude, gemini, agent, app, etc.

depth.description: Graph depth. Defaults to 0 without parent_id, otherwise 1.

node_id.description: Stable node id. Defaults to session_id for a director/root record.

parent_id.description: Parent node id when this is a child worker/sub-agent.

prompt_preview.description: Bounded preview only; do not send full prompts or secrets.

session_id.description: Stable activity/session id that groups related nodes.

status.description: running, idle, completed, failed, lost, or another future-safe status.

name: agent_swarm_run
description: Dispatch one prompt to Gemini, Claude, Codex, or auto-selected backend. Defaults to consult/read-only mode.

agent.description: Backend agent. Also accepts AGENT:MODEL strings at runtime.

allow_bypass_permissions.description: Explicitly allow Claude Code permission bypass in non-quiet mode.

model.description: Optional backend model hint; currently used by Claude

prompt.description: Task or question for the backend agent

quiet.description: Consult mode when true; agent/autonomous mode when false.

name: agent_swarm_swarm
description: Run a tracked manager/worker fan-out swarm and return the manager synthesis.

workers.description: Worker specs such as architecture=gemini or implementation=codex

name: agent_swarm_fanout
description: Alias for agent_swarm_swarm; run parallel workers with session events for live UIs.

workers.description: Worker specs such as architecture=gemini or implementation=codex

name: agent_swarm_discuss
description: Run a bounded multi-round discussion between agents, emit JSONL events, and return manager synthesis.

docs.description: Run a trailing API-docs recommendation subagent.

docs_agent.description: Backend for the docs follow-up, e.g. claude:sonnet

participants.description: Participant specs such as architecture=gemini or code-quality=claude:sonnet

name: agent_swarm_audit
description: Run a preset codebase audit discussion with local peer context, manager synthesis, session events, and optional API-docs follow-up.

docs.description: Run a trailing API-docs recommendation subagent.

docs_agent.description: Backend for the docs follow-up, e.g. claude:sonnet

participants.description: Override participant specs such as architecture=gemini

name: agent_swarm_discuss_start
description: Start a multi-agent discussion in a local background process and return immediately with a job id for live monitoring.

participants.description: Participant specs such as architecture=gemini or code-quality=claude:sonnet

name: agent_swarm_audit_start
description: Start a codebase audit council in a local background process and return immediately with a job id for live monitoring.

name: agent_swarm_design
description: Run a design-centered review council for product UI, motion, interaction, accessibility, and implementation planning.

docs.description: Run a trailing API-docs recommendation subagent.

docs_agent.description: Backend for the docs follow-up, e.g. claude:sonnet

participants.description: Override participant specs such as product-design=gemini

name: agent_swarm_job_start
description: Start a lightweight local Agent Swarm background job. Defaults to consult/read-only mode unless quiet=false.

agent.description: Backend agent. Also accepts AGENT:MODEL strings at runtime.

allow_bypass_permissions.description: Explicitly allow Claude Code permission bypass in non-quiet mode.

model.description: Optional backend model hint; currently used by Claude

prompt.description: Task or question for the backend agent

quiet.description: Consult mode when true; agent/autonomous mode when false.

name: agent_swarm_job_status
description: List recent Agent Swarm background jobs or inspect one by id.

name: agent_swarm_job_result
description: Return the result for one Agent Swarm background job, or the latest job when omitted.

name: agent_swarm_job_cancel
description: Cancel a queued or running Agent Swarm background job.

name: agent_swarm_session_list
description: List recent multi-agent discussion sessions.

name: agent_swarm_session_events
description: Return the JSONL event stream for a discussion session.

name: agent_swarm_session_transcript
description: Return the Markdown transcript for a discussion session.

name: agent_swarm_session_summary
description: Return bounded structured status, digest, and artifact pointers for one session.

name: agent_swarm_session_artifacts
description: Return filesystem artifact paths for one session without reconstructing paths in the client.

name: agent_swarm_runtime_processes
description: List tracked live/lost session and background-job processes for swarm monitoring.

name: agent_swarm_monitor_status
description: Return whether the Agent Swarm resource monitor sidecar is running and where alerts are stored.

name: agent_swarm_monitor_start
description: Start or replace the lightweight Agent Swarm monitor sidecar for RSS spike, stale job, and heartbeat alerts.

replace.description: Restart the sidecar when it is already running so new thresholds take effect.

name: agent_swarm_alerts
description: Return recent monitor alerts and heartbeat events for agents and dashboards.

name: agent_swarm_context_gather
description: Gather bounded read-only local context for a query, preferring ranked paths and excerpts over manifest dumps.

name: agent_swarm_overview
description: Return a single aggregated digest of all current swarm activity: running/recent sessions, running/recent jobs, active monitor alerts, and summary counts. One call instead of polling sessions + jobs + alerts separately.

name: agent_swarm_settings_get
description: Return the current [settings] section of the Agent Swarm config as JSON. Settings are adjustable via agent_swarm_settings_set and take effect on the next invocation.

name: agent_swarm_settings_set
description: Write a new [settings] section to the Agent Swarm config. All other config content is preserved (default_timeout, default_agent, [reliability], [routes], etc.). Changes take effect on the next invocation since config is loaded once per process.

docs_default.description: Enable the API-docs follow-up worker by default in discuss/design runs without --docs. Audit's built-in docs-ON is unaffected.
